approval.dev_start_tooltip: Start implementation immediately with the selected Developer agent
approval.wip_warning: {{count}} active plans — review bottleneck risk. Reducing WIP is recommended.

drafting.empty_details_warning: Some subtasks are missing detailed design.
drafting.no_subtasks_hint: No subtasks. Ask Architect in Chat to revise the Plan.
drafting.detail_design_prompt:
[Detailed design request] "{{title}}"

Please add **implementation method (how)** to each subtask in the Plan below.
For each subtask, write to details: files to modify/create, approach, and caveats.

{{planContext}}

Propose the revised Plan with detailed design in `<!-- tunaflow:plan-proposal -->` format.

subtask.follow_up_suffix: Please proceed with the task above.

verdict.code_rewrite_tooltip: Send findings to DEV and switch straight to implementation
verdict.redesign_tooltip: Return to Plan phase — Architect redesigns from the start
verdict.done_confirm_suffix: . Completing as-is may not produce expected behavior.
verdict.redesign_success: Original plan abandoned. Architect is starting a redesign.
verdict.redesign_event_reason: Review failed — original abandoned, redesign requested
verdict.findings_empty_conditional: (No detailed findings — check the Review Branch directly)
verdict.findings_empty_redesign: - (No detailed findings — refer to the Review Branch)
